testcase.name: US-730-0: Carrier Dashboard MVP › AC-1: Dashboard displays complete structure (hero + tabs + metrics)
US-730-0: Carrier Dashboard MVP › AC-2: Mobile-first design with 48px touch targets
US-730-0: Carrier Dashboard MVP › AC-2: Tap-only interactions (no swipe gestures)
US-730-0: Carrier Dashboard MVP › AC-3: Responsive design (iPhone 375px primary)
US-730-0: Carrier Dashboard MVP › AC-4: Component hierarchy and structure
US-730-0: Carrier Dashboard MVP › AC-5: WCAG AAA contrast verification (dark theme)
US-730-0: Carrier Dashboard MVP › AC-2: Performance - LCP <2s on 4G LTE
US-730-0: Carrier Dashboard MVP › AC-1 & AC-2: Golden path - owner-operator claims load from dashboard
US-730-0: Carrier Dashboard MVP › AC-4: Tab switching - No navigation, content swaps in place
